hooks.command: git -C ~/repos/shared-identity pull --ff-only --quiet >/dev/null 2>&1; git -C ~/repos/work-memory pull --ff-only --quiet >/dev/null 2>&1; git -C ~/repos/homelab-memory pull --ff-only --quiet >/dev/null 2>&1; true

{ cd ~/repos/work-memory || exit 0; git add -A && { git diff --cached --quiet || { git commit -m "[machine-name] session-end autosave $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" && git push; }; }; } >> /tmp/memory-autosave.log 2>&1 ; true
